flies without hurting them. Simon remarked that it was lucky she hadn't seen the van.
    After this we drove on through the heat for home. At 5.30. we took the route along Bristol Rd. + rt. at Cannon Hill up Priory Rd.
pages.notes: Text is a continuation from a previous page (no heading or date visible). 'Cannon Hill' likely refers to Cannon Hill Park area in Birmingham; 'Bristol Rd.' and 'Priory Rd.' are roads in Birmingham. No handwritten page number visible in top-left corner.

Page is blank apart from handwritten page number '57' in the top-right corner. The text visible at the left gutter edge is overflow from the left page (overlap zone) and is not transcribed again here.
